cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: To improve your experience. By continuing to browse, you accept our use of cookies.

form.title: Send a message
form.subtitle: All fields are required unless stated otherwise
form.subject: Reason for your enquiry
form.messagePlaceholder: Dates, number of guests, your request...

success.title: Message sent!
success.body: Thank you, we have received your request and will reply within 24 hours.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
errors.network: Unable to send your message. Please check your connection or email us.

reserver.support: A question, a group, a seminar? Call us:

home.title: Hotel-Restaurant Aspe Valley – Auberge Le Permayou
home.description: Inn, hotel, restaurant and bar in Accous, in the heart of the Aspe Valley. 8 rooms, local cuisine and a terrace facing the Pyrenees. A stop on the Way of St James.

restaurant.title: Restaurant in Accous, Aspe Valley
restaurant.description: The restaurant at Auberge Le Permayou in Accous: traditional, seasonal cuisine, produce from the Aspe Valley and Béarn specialities. Open for lunch and dinner, with a bar and snacks.

services.title: Hotel in Accous, Aspe Valley
services.description: The 2-star hotel at Auberge Le Permayou in Accous: 8 warm rooms, including rooms with mountain views and one wheelchair-accessible room. The perfect base in the Aspe Valley for hikers and cyclists.

barTerrasse.title: Bar & terrace facing the mountains
barTerrasse.description: The bar and terrace at Auberge Le Permayou in Accous, with views over the Cirque d'Iseye. A village bar open to all: apéritifs, a cyclist's break and coffee facing the mountains.

valleeDAspe.title: Things to do in the Aspe Valley
valleeDAspe.description: The Aspe Valley from Auberge Le Permayou: hiking (GR10, Way of St James), cycling (Col du Somport), wildlife and heritage. Your base camp in the heart of the Pyrenees.

reserver.title: Book a room in Accous
reserver.description: Book your stay at Auberge Le Permayou, in Accous in the Aspe Valley. 8 rooms, including one wheelchair-accessible room. Secure online booking or by phone.

contact.title: Contact & directions – Accous
contact.description: Contact Auberge Le Permayou in Accous (Aspe Valley): phone, email and directions. We'll gladly answer your questions about rooms, the restaurant or your stay.

aPropos.title: The inn – Coline & Julien
aPropos.description: Coline & Julien, the new owners of Auberge Le Permayou in Accous. Our story, our values and the spirit of a mountain inn in the heart of the Aspe Valley.
